title: F1 in Belgium: The 2026 cars look pathetic on all the best racetracks
summary: Over the weekend, the blame seemed to shift from Russell’s car to the driver, then back to the car again. There was—and is—something definitely wrong with Russell’s car, which was clearly slower than its sister car on several flat-out sections.
